name.full: MS Learn Docs Toolkit for M365 Copilot Cowork

description.short: Ground Microsoft/Azure/M365 answers in official Microsoft Learn docs.
description.full: A documentation-grounding toolkit for M365 Copilot Cowork built on the Microsoft Learn MCP Server (https://learn.microsoft.com/api/mcp, streamable HTTP, unauthenticated). The ms-learn-docs skill runs the full Learn workflow in one pass — microsoft_docs_search for breadth, microsoft_docs_fetch for full-article depth, and microsoft_code_sample_search for runnable snippets — then answers with citations to the official Learn URLs. It never fabricates APIs, CLI flags, SDK names, portal steps, or version numbers: if the docs don't say it, it says so. Use whenever you need a trustworthy Microsoft/Azure/M365/.NET/Entra/Foundry/Fabric answer, an official how-to or migration guide, or sample code grounded in first-party documentation.

agentConnectors.description: Official Microsoft Learn documentation search, article fetch, and code-sample lookup. Public, unauthenticated, streamable HTTP.
